task:
You are Neo, the developer for SlideHeroes internal tools.

## Task: MC #672 — Captures data model + API endpoints

Build the captures system in slideheroes-internal-tools (~/clawd/slideheroes-internal-tools/app).

### 1. Prisma Schema

Add a Capture model to the Prisma schema:

model Capture {
  id               Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  url              String
  title            String?
  author           String?
  sourceType       String?  // article, video, newsletter, social, tool, book
  rawContent       String?  // full text as fetched
  userNote         String?  // Mike verbatim note
  intents          String?  // JSON array: ["best-practice", "competitive-intel", ...]
  topicTags        String?  // JSON array: ["pricing", "onboarding", ...]
  extractedInsights String? // JSON object with intent-specific extractions
  captureSource    String   @default("discord") // discord, email
  captureChannel   String?  // Discord channel id
  messageId        String?  // Discord message id (for dedup)
  status           String   @default("unprocessed") // unprocessed, processed, applied
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([url, messageId])
}

### 2. API Endpoints

Create app/src/app/api/v1/captures/route.ts:

GET /api/v1/captures
- Query params: status, intent (contains match on intents JSON), topic (contains match on topicTags), search (searches url, title, userNote, rawContent, extractedInsights), limit, offset
- Returns: captures list with pagination
- Default sort: updatedAt desc

POST /api/v1/captures
- Body: { url, title?, author?, sourceType?, rawContent?, userNote?, intents?, topicTags?, extractedInsights?, captureSource?, captureChannel?, messageId?, status? }
- Returns: created capture
- Dedup: if url+messageId already exists, return existing record (don't create duplicate)

Create app/src/app/api/v1/captures/[id]/route.ts:

PATCH /api/v1/captures/:id
- Body: any updatable fields + optional activity_note
- Returns: updated capture

DELETE /api/v1/captures/:id

### 3. Follow existing patterns

Look at how tasks API is built (app/src/app/api/v1/tasks/) for patterns:
- Error handling
- Response format
- Prisma client usage
- CF Access headers (if needed)

### 4. Run migration

npx prisma migrate dev --name add-captures

### 5. Test

After building, test with curl:
- POST a test capture
- GET all captures
- GET with search filter
- PATCH to update status
- DELETE

### Important
- Push to main after committing! This repo deploys on push.
- Run pnpm typecheck before committing.
